ddls:
CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "date_announced" TEXT /* Date the data was announced */,
  "num_cases_h" INTEGER /* Number of new hospitalizations on the announced date */,
  "total_cases_h" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalizations up to the announced date */,
  "num_cases_r" INTEGER /* Number of new recoveries on the announced date */,
  "total_cases_r" INTEGER /* Total number of recoveries up to the announced date */,
  "num_cases_d" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths on the announced date */,
  "total_cases_d" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths up to the announced date */,
  "num_cases_active" INTEGER /* Number of active cases on the announced date */,
  "total_cases_active" INTEGER /* Total number of active cases up to the announced date */,
  "num_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinated individuals on the announced date */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinated individuals up to the announced date */,
  "test_positivity_rate" TEXT /* Test positivity rate for the announced date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "density_per_km2" TEXT /* Population density per square kilometer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the case was reported */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of case (e.g., hospitalization, recovery, death) */,
  "date_confirmed" TEXT /* Date the case was confirmed */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the case (e.g., admitted, recovered, deceased) */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms reported by the patient */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., community, contact) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the intervention was implemented */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the intervention (as a percentage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_centers" (
  "vaccination_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination center */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the vaccination center is located */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vaccination center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vaccination center */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_centers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination */,
  "vaccination_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination center where the vaccination was administered */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "date_administered" TEXT /* Date the vaccination was administered */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number of the vaccination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_vaccination_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_center_id") REFERENCES vaccination_centers ("vaccination_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region related to the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
